probes.name: thd_below_limit
probes.description: 4.0% third harmonic must stay under the 5% THD rule.

probes.name: thd_above_limit
probes.description: 6.0% third harmonic must trip the 5% THD rule.

probes.name: thd_bias_sentinel
probes.description: 5.5% third harmonic guards against a low-biased THD estimator (the superseded change measured true 5% as 2.95%).

probes.name: reconstruction_below_threshold
probes.description: Noise at 90% of the bisected boundary amplitude must not trip the reconstruction rule.

probes.name: reconstruction_above_threshold
probes.description: Noise at 110% of the bisected boundary amplitude must trip the reconstruction rule.

probes.name: flatline_fails_closed
probes.description: A zero-energy flatline has no fundamental and must alarm via THD.

probes.name: nonfinite_fails_closed
probes.description: Non-finite telemetry must alarm via the invalid-input rule.

attacks.name: replay_masking
attacks.description: Anomalous records replaced with ideal noiseless replicas to hide real faults from the learned detector.

attacks.name: phase_bias
attacks.description: Phase A of clean records scaled by 6%, under the 5% THD rule.

attacks.name: coordinated
attacks.description: Opposing mild phase biases spread across physics checks so no single bound trips; caught by the fused joint score.
